growth_records.medium: Optimised LMO-812 (defined marine medium) + 10 mM glucose

mfa.note: PEP->OAA absent in WS11 (constrained off); uses PYR carboxylation
highest TCA flux of the four strains

growth_records.cite: Yuxue Yang et al. Metabolic Flux Analysis Reveals Entner-Doudoroff Pathway Dominance in Heterotrophic Deep-Sea Bacterial Isolates. Environmental Microbiology Reports (2026). DOI:10.1111/1758-2229.70379. [PMC13261371]
growth_records.method: reported (max specific growth rate from OD600, 0.054 +/- 0.001 /h); td CALCULATED=0.693/0.054=12.83 h
growth_records.snippet: 0.054 +/- 0.001 h-1 ... WS11 0.74 +/- 0.15 (Glucose consumption umol/h) ... Biomass yield 0.49 +/- 0.02 ... the reaction PEP + CO2 -> OAA was absent in strains WS11 and W43
growth_records.notes: mu 0.054/h; td=0.693/0.054=12.83 h. Glucose consumption 0.74 umol/h. Yxs=0.49 g CDW/g glucose. PEP carboxylase reaction absent in genome (constrained off in model); anaplerosis via pyruvate carboxylation. Temp 28C, glucose 10 mM. Harvest 45 h, OD600 0.18. No secretion products quantified.
